name: games
description: Terminal games for Claude Code wait time — quick multiplayer matches against other waiting devs. /games rotates through the arcade; /play <game> launches a specific one. Game 1: fragwait, a terminal FPS deathmatch. Game 2: checkwait, terminal blitz chess. Game 3: boomwait, terminal bomber. Game 4: snakewait, terminal snake battle. Game 5: blockwait, terminal block-stacking duel.
